description: Migma is an AI email platform for generating, previewing, validating, sending, and exporting branded emails, plus managing audiences, campaigns, domains, and webhooks. It also offers agent-oriented access patterns so AI tools and MCP clients can work with a user’s Migma account.
summary: Migma exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at api.migma.ai, an OAuth- or bearer-authenticated remote MCP server at migma.ai/mcp, and a `migma` CLI that authenticates via interactive login or `MIGMA_API_KEY`.
